data.name: Angled Grip II Blueprint
data.description: Lets you craft an Angled Grip II
data.article: The Angled Grip II Blueprint is a blueprint that allows you to craft the Angled Grip II weapon modification at a Gunsmith workbench, which helps reduce a weapon's horizontal recoil. Once you learn it by using it in Speranza, you can craft the modification. Raiders can obtain this blueprint by scavenging residential containers found across all maps. It is also available as a reward from Weekly Trials or can be purchased from the vendor Shani for coins.

data.name: Angled Grip III Blueprint
data.description: Lets you craft an Angled Grip III
data.article: The Angled Grip III Blueprint is a blueprint that unlocks the crafting recipe for the Angled Grip III at a Workbench. You can find this blueprint by scavenging inside Residential Containers across any map. It appears specifically during certain map conditions, like an Electromagnetic Storm, Locked Gate, or Night Raid. Alternatively, it can be acquired as a reward from Weekly Trials.

data.name: Anvil Blueprint
data.description: Lets you craft an Anvil - Has high damage output and headshot damage, but slow handling.
data.article:
The Anvil Blueprint is a blueprint that allows you to craft the Anvil I hand cannon. Once you have it, this blueprint also allows you to upgrade it into its improved versions: Anvil II, Anvil III, and Anvil IV. Crafting requires access to a Gunsmith station found in your Hideout.

You can find the Anvil Blueprint by opening various containers or by purchasing it from Tian Wen for coins.

data.name: Aphelion Rifle Blueprint
data.description: Lets you craft an Aphelion Rifle
data.article: This blueprint allows Raiders to craft the Aphelion Rifle at a Workbench, provided they have achieved the required Gunsmith bench level. It is known for firing high-velocity energy rounds in two-round bursts. You can find it in the Stella Montis map, or it may be awarded upon completing the Furtive Meetings quest.

data.name: Barricade Kit Blueprint
data.description: Lets you craft a Barricade Kit
data.article: The Barricade Kit Blueprint is a blueprint that teaches you how to craft a Barricade Kit at a utility station. It creates a wall-like structure that offers deployable cover, helping to block incoming damage during engagements. These kits can also be dismantled and redeployed. This blueprint is primarily obtained by looting Mk.3 Safekeepers found during your raids.

data.name: Bettina Blueprint
data.description: Has slow fire rate and high damage output.
data.article: The Bettina Blueprint is a blueprint that allows you to craft the Bettina I assault rifle at a crafting station with Gunsmith capabilities. This fully-automatic rifle is known for its relatively slow fire rate and high damage output. It also provides the ability to upgrade it into its improved versions: Bettina II, Bettina III, and Bettina IV.

data.name: Blaze Grenade Blueprint
data.description: Lets you craft a Blaze Grenade
data.article: The Blaze Grenade Blueprint is a blueprint that allows you to craft Blaze Grenades at an Explosives Station or Workbench. These grenades are throwable items that explode upon hitting a surface, leaving behind an area of fire that burns and damages ARCs for a short period. You can find it by scavenging throughout different areas as you explore.

data.name: Blue Light Stick Blueprint
data.description: Lets you craft a Blue Light Stick.
data.article: The Blue Light Stick Blueprint is a blueprint that allows you to craft a Blue Light Stick. To use it, select it and choose "Learn and Consume" while in Speranza, your personal hub. This blueprint is obtained by searching Electrical Containers, which are found on any map. It can also be acquired as a reward from Trials.

data.name: Bobcat Blueprint
data.description: Lets you craft a Bobcat I
data.article: The Bobcat Blueprint is a blueprint that allows you to craft the Bobcat I submachine gun at a Gunsmith Bench in your Hideout, assuming you meet the crafting requirements. It is generally obtained by participating in specific in-game events or by interacting with certain points across the maps, as indicated by mentions of a "locked gate event" associated with its discovery.

data.name: Burletta Blueprint
data.description: Lets you craft a Burletta
data.article: The Burletta Blueprint is a blueprint that allows you to craft the Burletta item. Obtaining blueprints like this allows Raiders to expand their available gear options, which helps with overall progression. The specific way to acquire this blueprint is often a topic of discussion among Raiders, with many wondering if it exists or if it is tied to a particular quest. Raiders looking for blueprints can often utilize the Needed Items Tracker to keep tabs on what they need.

data.name: Canto Blueprint
data.description: Lets you craft a Canto SMG.
data.article: The Canto Blueprint is a blueprint that teaches you how to craft the Canto, a fully-automatic submachine gun, at a Gunsmith. This blueprint is found by opening First Wave Caches.

data.name: Combat Mk.3 (Aggressive) Blueprint
data.description: An improved version of the Combat II augment. Supports more shield types and comes with extra space for grenades
data.article: The Combat Mk.3 (Aggressive) Blueprint is a blueprint that allows you to craft the Combat Mk. 3 (Aggressive) augment at a Gear Bench. This augment improves upon the Combat Mk. 2 by offering compatibility with more shield types and providing extra space for grenades. When equipped, it also helps restore your health over time. It can be found as loot throughout the world, often discovered in containers or obtained after looting arcs across different maps.

data.name: Combat Mk. 3 (Flanking) Blueprint
data.description: Lets you craft a Combat Mk. 3 (Flanking)
data.article: The Combat Mk. 3 (Flanking) Blueprint is a blueprint that allows you to create the Combat Mk. 3 (Flanking), a special gear piece that enhances your combat abilities. This particular augment focuses on maneuverability, letting you equip stowed pistols and hand cannons 33% faster. It is designed to work with both light and medium shields. To acquire it, you must first find this blueprint by scavenging during your raids, and then use it at a Gear Bench to craft the item.

data.name: Compensator II Blueprint
data.description: Lets you craft a Compensator II
data.article: This blueprint allows Raiders to craft the Compensator II, a weapon mod that helps reduce bullet spread when firing. Raiders can find it by scavenging during raids, often inside Residential Containers. It can also be earned as a reward from Weekly Trials. Additionally, Raiders can purchase it from Shani for 100 coins, with a limit of two per day. Once learned, this blueprint is consumed and unlocks the crafting recipe at a Gunsmith Bench.

data.name: Compensator III Blueprint
data.description: Lets you craft a Compensator III
data.article: The Compensator III Blueprint is a blueprint that allows you to craft the Compensator III at a Gunsmith Bench. This modification helps reduce how much your shots spread out when you fire quickly, and also lessens the overall maximum spread of your shots. It does cause your weapon to lose durability faster.

data.name: Complex Gun Parts Blueprint
data.description: Used to craft advanced weapons.
data.article: The Complex Gun Parts Blueprint is a blueprint that allows you to craft Complex Gun Parts at a Refiner. These are then used with other blueprints at a Gunsmith to craft weapons.

data.name: Crash Mat Blueprint
data.description: Lets you craft a Crash Mat.

guide_links.label: How to Find Crash Mat Blueprint

data.article: The Crash Mat Blueprint is a blueprint that teaches you how to craft a Crash Mat at the Utility Station. It is a throwable item that creates an inflatable mat, which you can fall onto to reduce damage from heavy landings.

data.name: Deadline Blueprint
data.description: Lets you craft a Deadline Mine
data.article: The Deadline Blueprint is a blueprint that teaches you how to craft a Deadline. It is a mine you can place that explodes after a fixed 6-second timer, dealing damage to anything nearby. You can buy this blueprint from Apollo for 18,000 coins; he sells one per day. Once learned, you can craft it at an Explosives Station level 1.

data.name: Defibrillator Blueprint
data.description: Lets you craft a Defibrillator
data.article: The Defibrillator Blueprint is a blueprint that allows you to craft a healing item at a Medical Lab. It is used to quickly revive downed Raiders and restore some of their health. This blueprint can be bought from Lance for 3,000 coins.

data.name: Dolabra Blueprint
data.description: Lets you craft a Dolabra Shotgun.
data.article: The Dolabra Blueprint is a blueprint that allows you to craft the Dolabra at a Gunsmith bench. This blueprint is found by looting ARC Assessor.

data.name: Equalizer Blueprint
data.description: A high capacity experimental beam rifle.
data.article: The Equalizer Blueprint is a blueprint that allows you to craft the Equalizer at Gunsmith. This fully-automatic special beam rifle fires energy-based projectiles. You can obtain it by finding it inside the Harvester.

data.name: Explosive Mine Blueprint
data.description: Lets you craft an Explosive Mine
data.article: The Explosive Mine Blueprint is a blueprint that lets you craft Explosive Mines at an Explosives Station. An Explosive Mine is a device that detonates when enemies enter its detection radius, releasing a blast that damages targets in the vicinity.

data.name: Extended Barrel II Blueprint
data.description: Moderately increases bullet velocity & distance until damage falloff.
data.article: The Extended Barrel II Blueprint is a blueprint that, once acquired, permanently unlocks your ability to craft the extended barrel ii at a crafting station in your Hideout whenever you have the required materials.

data.name: Extended Barrel III Blueprint
data.description: Lets you craft an Extended Barrel
data.article: The Extended Barrel III Blueprint is a blueprint that allows you to craft an extended barrel attachment at the Workbench. It improves how fast bullets travel from your weapons.

data.name: Extended Light Mag II Blueprint
data.description: Lets you craft a Extended Light Mag II
data.article: The Extended Light Mag II Blueprint is a blueprint that allows you to craft the Extended Light Mag II weapon mod at a Gunsmith Bench, which helps by increasing the ammo capacity of compatible weapons. Blueprints for gun parts, such as this one, are typically found when scavenging Raider Containers, which can appear in any map. They may also be obtained as a reward from Trials. Once you use a blueprint, it is consumed and the recipe becomes permanently available for crafting. If you find a blueprint you already know, it can be sold for 5,000 coins.

data.name: Extended Light Mag III Blueprint
data.description: Lets you craft a Extended Light Mag III
data.article: The Extended Light Mag III Blueprint is a blueprint that allows you to craft the Extended Light Mag III modification at a Gunsmith Bench level 1. This weapon mod significantly increases the ammunition capacity of compatible weapons.

data.name: Extended Medium Mag II Blueprint
data.description: Lets you craft a Extended Medium Mag II
data.article: The Extended Medium Mag II Blueprint is a blueprint that allows you to create the Extended Medium Mag II at a crafting station with a Gunsmith skill level of 2. This weapon attachment increases the ammo capacity of compatible weapons that use medium ammo, letting you fire more shots before needing to reload. You can purchase this blueprint from the vendor Shani for 100 coins, with a daily limit of two. It can also be found through scavenging.

data.name: Extended Medium Mag III Blueprint
data.description: Lets you craft the Medium Mag III
data.article: This is a blueprint that allows you to craft the Extended Medium Mag III weapon mod at a Gunsmith bench level 1. Once crafted, it helps your compatible weapons hold a significantly larger amount of ammunition. It can also be recycled for resources.

data.name: Extended Shotgun Mag II Blueprint
data.description: Lets you craft a Extended Shotgun Mag II - Moderately extends the ammo capacity of shotguns.
data.article: The Extended Shotgun Mag II Blueprint is a blueprint that allows you to craft the Extended Shotgun Mag II weapon mod at a Gunsmith bench level 1. This mod moderately increases the ammo capacity of shotguns. Blueprints can be obtained through scavenging, by completing Weekly Trials or projects, or as rewards from Quests. Certain ARCs can also drop blueprints. Unwanted blueprints can be sold for 5,000 coins.

data.name: Extended Shotgun Mag III Blueprint
data.description: Lets you craft a Extended Shotgun Mag III
data.article: The Extended Shotgun Mag III Blueprint is a blueprint that allows you to craft the Extended Shotgun Mag III at the Gunsmith. This weapon modification for shotguns significantly increases ammunition capacity.

data.name: Fireworks Box Blueprint
data.description: Lets you craft a Fireworks Box
data.article: The Fireworks Box Blueprint is a blueprint that lets you craft a Fireworks Box. This blueprint can be found as a reward for completing certain quests. Additionally, it is often discovered in breachable containers and lockers during the Cold Snap event. Raiders have reported finding it in areas like the Water Treatment and Power Generation Complex within the Dam map, in hospital lockers on the Buried City map, and near extraction vents in the Blue Gate map. The blueprint has a value of 5000 coins.

data.name: Gas Mine Blueprint
data.description: Lets you craft a Gas Mine
data.article: The Gas Mine Blueprint is a blueprint that unlocks the crafting recipe for the Gas Mine. Once you use this blueprint in Speranza, the recipe becomes permanently available, and the blueprint is consumed. With the recipe learned, you can then craft it at an Explosives Station level 1. It is a mine that is triggered when ARCs get near, releasing a cloud of gas that quickly drains their stamina and makes it difficult for them to see.

data.name: Green Light Stick Blueprint
data.description: Lets you craft a Green Light Stick.
data.article: The Green Light Stick Blueprint is a blueprint that allows you to craft a Green Light Stick.

data.name: Heavy Gun Parts Blueprint
data.description: Used directly in crafting items of all tiers.
data.article: The Heavy Gun Parts Blueprint is a schematic that teaches you how to craft Heavy Gun Parts at a Refiner. This process requires crafting materials as ingredients. They are then used to upgrade, craft, and repair various weapons, and are also a component in creating other items at a Gunsmith.

data.name: Hullcracker Blueprint
data.description: Lets you craft an Hullcracker
data.article: The Hullcracker Blueprint is a blueprint that allows you to craft the Hullcracker I at the Gunsmith. You can obtain this blueprint as a reward upon completing the quest called "The Major's Footlocker". For an overview of available tasks, visit the Quests page.

data.name: Il Toro Blueprint
data.description: Lets you craft an Il Toro
data.article: The Il Toro Blueprint is a blueprint that allows Raiders to create the Il Toro shotgun at a Gunsmith bench. It is known for its high damage output at close distances.

data.name: Jolt Mine Blueprint
data.description: Lets you craft a Jolt Mine
data.article: The Jolt Mine Blueprint is a blueprint that, when used, unlocks the ability to craft the Jolt Mine. Once you learn it in Speranza, the blueprint is consumed. You can find this blueprint by scavenging from Industrial Containers across any map, or it can be obtained as a reward for completing Weekly Trials. Blueprints you have already learned are marked and cannot be used again. If you have extra blueprints, they can be sold for 5,000 coins.

data.name: Jupiter Blueprint
data.description: Fires projectiles at an incredible velocity, capable of damaging multiple targets with one shot.
data.article: The Jupiter Blueprint is a blueprint that allows you to craft the Jupiter at a Gunsmith bench. Raiders obtain this blueprint by defeating the Harvester, an ARC.

data.name: Light Gun Parts Blueprint
data.description: Lets you craft Light Gun Parts
data.article:
I need the Refiner level number to complete the correction. The article currently shows "[NEEDS LEVEL NUMBER]" as a placeholder.

Please provide: - What level Refiner is required to craft Light Gun Parts?

Once you provide this, I can output the fully corrected HTML.

data.name: Lightweight Stock Blueprint
data.description: Lets you craft a Lightweight Stock
data.article: The Lightweight Stock Blueprint is a blueprint that allows you to craft the Lightweight Stock. This weapon modification helps improve the speed at which you aim down sights and ready your weapon. You can craft it at the Gunsmith Bench level 3 using a combination of different materials.

data.name: Looting MK. 3 (Safekeeper) Blueprint
data.description: Lets you craft the Looting Mk. 3 (Safekeeper) Augment.
data.article: The Looting MK. 3 (Safekeeper) Blueprint is a blueprint that allows you to create an augment at Gear Bench. This augment provides a secure pocket for storing items found during raids and specifically allows you to Safe-pocket a weapon - something other augments do not allow.

data.name: Looting MK. 3 (Survivor) Blueprint
data.description: A heavy-duty pack mule augment. Large weight capacity and large backpack space.
data.article: The Looting Mk. 3 (Survivor) Blueprint allows you to craft the Looting Mk. 3 (Survivor) augment at a Gear Bench. It increases your carry weight and backpack space, and provides a benefit where you can regenerate up to 75% of your health when you are downed and staying still.

data.name: Lure Grenade Blueprint
data.description: Lets you craft a Lure Grenade
data.article: The Lure Grenade Blueprint is a blueprint that allows you to craft Lure Grenades at a Utility Station. These grenades create noise to distract nearby ARCs, making them focus their attacks on the grenade instead of you. This blueprint is obtained as a reward from completing the Greasing Her Palms quest.

data.name: Medium Gun Parts Blueprint
data.description: Lets you craft Medium Gun Parts
data.article: The Medium Gun Parts Blueprint is a blueprint that allows Raiders to craft medium gun parts at the Refiner. These parts are a resource used in various crafting projects, primarily for building and upgrading weapon components.

data.name: Muzzle Brake II Blueprint
data.description: Lets you craft a Muzzle Brake II
data.article: The Muzzle Brake II Blueprint is a blueprint that allows you to craft the Muzzle Brake II weapon modification at a Gunsmith Bench level 2 to reduce a weapon's vertical and horizontal recoil. Blueprints like this are commonly found by scavenging in containers such as Raider Containers. They can also be acquired as rewards from Weekly Trials or Quests.

data.name: Muzzle Brake III Blueprint
data.description: Lets you craft a Muzzle Brake III
data.article: The Muzzle Brake III Blueprint is a blueprint that allows you to craft the Muzzle Brake III at a Gunsmith Bench. This item is a weapon modification that helps reduce how much your weapon kicks up (vertical recoil) and swings side-to-side (horizontal recoil) when you fire it.

data.name: Osprey Blueprint
data.description: Has reliable damage output and accuracy.
data.article: The Osprey Blueprint is a blueprint that allows you to construct the Osprey I sniper rifle. It enables creation of improved versions, letting you upgrade an Osprey I to an Osprey II, then to an Osprey III, and finally to an Osprey IV. Crafting the initial Osprey I requires a Gunsmith skill level of 2, while upgrading to subsequent tiers requires a Gunsmith skill level of 1.

data.name: Padded Stock Blueprint
data.description: Lets you craft a Padded Stock
data.article: The Padded Stock Blueprint is a blueprint that allows you to craft the Padded Stock weapon modification at a Gunsmith Bench. This modification improves weapon stability by reducing vertical and horizontal recoil, and also lessens how much your shots spread. However, it slightly increases the time it takes to ready your weapon or aim down sights. You can obtain this blueprint by looting Surveyor ARCs.

data.name: Powered Descender Blueprint
data.description: Reduces fall speed when used in the air, but has a wind-up time before reaching full force. Shuts down once out of power.

guide_links.label: How to Find Powered Descender Blueprint

data.article: The Powered Descender Blueprint is a blueprint that teaches you how to craft the Powered Descender at a Utility Station. This gadget reduces your fall speed when you use it in the air, allowing for safer descents. It takes a moment to reach its full effect and will shut down once its power runs out.

data.name: Pulse Mine Blueprint
data.description: Lets you craft a Pulse Mine
data.article: The Pulse Mine Blueprint is a blueprint that allows you to craft the Pulse Mine at an Explosives Station. These are proximity-triggered devices that activate when enemies come near, with a 1-second delay before detonating. Upon detonation, they release a kinetic blast that does not deal damage, but pushes back targets within a 7.5-meter radius. It can be acquired from Apollo for 1,410 coins, with a daily purchasing limit of six.

data.name: Rascal Blueprint
data.description: Fires explosive projectiles that only detonate when hitting ARC.
data.article:
The Rascal Blueprint is a rare blueprint in ARC Raiders, added in Patch 1.29.0. If you're wondering how to find the Rascal Blueprint in ARC Raiders - it drops from Raider Containers across all maps and requires a Gunsmith Workbench to craft.

Best Ways to Find the Rascal Blueprint:

  • Raider Containers — Weapon Cases, Raider Caches, and Ammo Crates are your best source across all maps.

  • Security Breach Lockers — Breach Lockers scattered across all maps have confirmed drops. Use Metaforge Interactive Maps to find them.

  • Key Rooms — Locked rooms with high loot density can also yield the blueprint as a general drop.

Tips to Maximize Rascal Blueprint Drops: Run Night Raid for boosted rare blueprint drop rates. Safe Pocket the blueprint the moment you find it. Go in naked with items to keep farming runs low-risk.

data.name: Red Light Stick Blueprint
data.description: Lets you craft a Red Light Stick.
data.article: The Red Light Stick Blueprint is a blueprint that allows you to craft the red light stick at the appropriate crafting station.

data.name: Remote Raider Flare Blueprint
data.description: Allows you to craft the Remote Raider Flare.
data.article: The Remote Raider Flare Blueprint is a blueprint that allows you to produce Remote Raider Flares at a Utility Station. A Remote Raider Flare is a deployable tool that, when activated, launches a distress signal into the sky.

data.name: Seeker Grenade Blueprint
data.description: Lets you craft a Seeker Grenade
data.article: The Seeker Grenade Blueprint is a blueprint that unlocks the ability to craft seeker grenades at the Refiner, providing you with more options for dealing with ARCs during your raids.

data.name: Shotgun Choke II Blueprint
data.description: Lets you craft a Shotgun Choke II
data.article: The Shotgun Choke II Blueprint is a blueprint that allows you to craft the Shotgun Choke II weapon modification at the Gunsmith. This modification helps improve shotguns by reducing how much their shots spread.

data.name: Shotgun Choke III Blueprint
data.description: Lets you craft a Shotgun Choke III
data.article: The Shotgun Choke III Blueprint is a blueprint that allows you to craft a weapon mod at the Gunsmith bench level 3. This mod helps shotguns fire pellets in a tighter pattern, making their shots more focused.

data.name: Shotgun Silencer Blueprint
data.description: Lets you craft a Shotgun Silencer. Moderately reduces the amount of noise produced when firing.
data.article: The Shotgun Silencer Blueprint is a blueprint that allows you to craft the Shotgun Silencer at the Gunsmith. This weapon modification is designed to reduce the amount of noise your shotgun makes when fired and is compatible with shotguns. The blueprint itself can be recycled for resources.

data.name: Showstopper Blueprint
data.description: Lets you craft a Showstopper.
data.article: The Showstopper Blueprint is a blueprint that allows you to craft the Showstopper grenade at an Explosives Station. This grenade is designed to stun ARCs and other Raiders within its blast radius of 6 meters. It detonates after a 3.5-second delay, stunning ARCs for 7 seconds and Raiders for 2 seconds.

data.name: Silencer I Blueprint
data.description: Lets you craft a Silencer I
data.article: The Silencer I Blueprint is a blueprint that allows you to craft the Silencer I weapon mod at a Gunsmith Bench level 2. This mod helps reduce the amount of noise your weapon makes when you fire it. The blueprint itself can be recycled for coins and other resources.

data.name: Silencer II Blueprint
data.description: Lets you craft a Silencer II
data.article: The Silencer II Blueprint is a blueprint that allows you to craft a Silencer II weapon mod at a Gunsmith Bench. This mod helps reduce the sound your weapon makes when firing.

data.name: Smoke Grenade Blueprint
data.description: Lets you craft a Smoke Grenade
data.article: A Smoke Grenade Blueprint allows you to craft smoke grenades at a Workbench or Utility Station, which create a cloud to block visibility from ARCs and other Raiders. It can be found by looting containers in the Buried City map during Night Raid or Cold Snap game types.

data.name: Snap Hook Blueprint
data.description: Lets you craft a Snap Hook
data.article:
The Snap Hook Blueprint is a blueprint that teaches you how to build the Snap Hook, which allows you to move quickly across distances or reach higher spots. Once learned, you can craft it at a Utility Station.

You can find this blueprint during Electromagnetic Storm map condition on various maps, most commonly in Residential loot areas.

data.name: Stable Stock II Blueprint
data.description: Lets you craft a Stable Stock II
data.article: The Stable Stock II Blueprint is a blueprint that teaches you how to craft the Stable Stock II weapon modification at a Gunsmith. Once learned, it improves how your gun handles by making it recover faster from recoil and spread. This blueprint can be found through scavenging, often appearing in Raider Containers across any map. It can also be obtained as a reward for completing quests or by succeeding in trials.

data.name: Stable Stock III Blueprint
data.description: Lets you craft a Stable Stock III
data.article:
The Stable Stock III Blueprint is a blueprint that allows you to craft the Stable Stock III weapon modification at a Gunsmith Bench. This modification improves weapon handling by reducing shot spread and recoil recovery time.

You can find this blueprint:

  • Inside containers like Boxes, Ammo Crates, Breachable Containers, and Lockers.
  • Across maps such as the Spaceport, Blue Gate, Dam Battlegrounds, Buried City, and Riven Tides.
  • During events including Cold Snap, Electromagnetic Storm, Night Raid, Hurricane, and Locked Gate.

Recycling the blueprint yields coins.

data.name: Surge Coil Blueprint
data.description: Lets you craft a Surge Coil.
data.article:
The Surge Coil Blueprint is a blueprint that allows you to craft the Surge Coil, a deployable device that electrifies the area around it. When placed, it periodically sends out an electric pulse that briefly stuns both ARCs and other Raiders who come too close. This can be useful for controlling areas, buying extra time during combat or looting, and escaping fast-moving ARCs like Shredders.

You can find the Surge Coil Blueprint by looting various containers, such as lockers, desk drawers, cupboards, and industrial crates, during the Electromagnetic Storm map condition. You must be in a map where this condition is active. Check the Event Timers to see when the Electromagnetic Storm is running on any map. It has been reported to drop in areas like the Testing Annex, Water Treatment Facility, and Hydroponic Domes within the Dam Battlegrounds, among others.

data.name: Tactical MK.3 (Defensive) Blueprint
data.description: a defense-focused augment for keeping Shields topped up
data.article: The Tactical MK.3 (Defensive) Blueprint is a blueprint that allows you to craft the Tactical Mk.3 (Defensive) augment at a Gear Bench. It helps keep your shields full, letting you use a Shield Recharger even while running.

data.name: Tactical MK.3 (Healing) Blueprint
data.description: A healing-focused augment which adds extra slots for healing items.
data.article: The Tactical MK.3 (Healing) Blueprint is a blueprint that allows you to craft a specialized augment designed for healing at Gear Bench. When equipped, the augment provides more capacity for healing items and, upon being revived from a downed state, creates a healing cloud that instantly restores 45 health. This effect has a 45-second cooldown. It can also be recycled for resources or salvaged for components.

data.name: Tactical Mk. 3 (Revival) Blueprint
data.description: Lets you craft Tactical MK. 3 (Revival) Blueprint.
data.article: The Tactical Mk. 3 (Revival) Blueprint is a blueprint that allows you to craft the Tactical Mk. 3 (Revival) augment at a Gear Bench. It comes with an integrated defibrillator, offering a utility option for use during raids. You can obtain this blueprint by participating in the Locked Gate event.

data.name: Tactical MK.3 (Smoke) Blueprint
data.description: An upgraded version of the Tactical MK. 2 augment, adding expanded capacity across the board.
data.article: The Tactical MK.3 (Smoke) Blueprint is a blueprint used to craft the Tactical Mk. 3 (Smoke) augment at a Gear Bench. It automatically deploys a small smoke grenade when your shield breaks, which can provide momentary cover.

data.name: Tagging Grenade Blueprint
data.description: Lets you craft a Tagging Grenade
data.article: The Tagging Grenade Blueprint is a blueprint that allows you to craft Tagging Grenades at a Utility Station. Once thrown, it detonates to briefly reveal the locations of ARCs and other Raiders in its blast area.

data.name: Tempest Blueprint
data.description: Lets you craft a Tempest
data.article: The Tempest Blueprint is a blueprint that allows you to craft the Tempest I assault rifle at a Gunsmith. You can obtain it by scavenging in the game world, and it has been found during 'Night Raid' events.

data.name: Torrente Blueprint
data.description: Lets you craft a Torrente
data.article: The Torrente Blueprint is a blueprint that allows Raiders to craft the Torrente weapon.

data.name: Trailblazer Grenade Blueprint
data.description: Lets you craft a Trailblazer Grenade
data.article: The Trailblazer Grenade Blueprint is a blueprint used at an Explosives Station level 1 to craft Trailblazer Grenades. They release a trail of flammable gas along their path, which then ignites and explodes after a short delay.

data.name: Trigger Nade Blueprint
data.description: Lets you craft a Trigger Nade
data.article: The Trigger Nade Blueprint is a blueprint that allows you to craft trigger nades at the appropriate crafting station.

data.name: Venator Blueprint
data.description: Lets you craft a Venator. Fires two shots at a time.
data.article: The Venator Blueprint is a blueprint that allows you to craft the Venator at a crafting station.

data.name: Vertical Grip II Blueprint
data.description: Lets you craft a Vertical Grip II
data.article: The Vertical Grip II Blueprint is a blueprint used at the Gunsmith Bench level 1 that allows you to create the Vertical Grip II, an underbarrel weapon modification. Attaching this modification to a compatible weapon helps reduce its vertical recoil.

data.name: Vertical Grip III Blueprint
data.description: Lets you craft a Vertical Grip III
data.article:
The Vertical Grip III Blueprint is a blueprint that allows you to craft the Vertical Grip III weapon mod at the Gunsmith. This mod greatly reduces a weapon's vertical recoil by 40%, helping you maintain accuracy during combat.

It can also be recycled for coins.

data.name: Vita Shot Blueprint
data.description: Lets you craft a Vita Shot - A medical item that restores a large amount of health.
data.article: The Vita Shot Blueprint is a blueprint that allows you to craft vita shots at the Medical Lab. A vita shot is a medical item that restores a large amount of health when used. This blueprint has been observed to be found by Raiders in the Stella Montis map, particularly during medical night raids.

data.name: Vita Spray Blueprint
data.description: Lets you craft a Vita Spray
data.article: The Vita Spray Blueprint is a blueprint used at the Medical Lab to craft Vita Spray. This medical item continuously restores health when used, either on yourself or an ally.

data.name: Vulcano Blueprint
data.description: Allows you to craft the Vulcano.
data.article: The Vulcano Blueprint is a blueprint that allows you to craft at the Refiner. You can discover it by inspecting electrical panels found in the game world. Another blueprint you might find is the Tempest Blueprint.

data.name: White Flag Blueprint
data.description: A deployable white flag.

guide_links.label: How to Find White Flag Blueprint

data.article: The White Flag Blueprint is a blueprint that allows you to craft a white flag.

data.name: Wolfpack Blueprint
data.description: Lets you craft a Wolfpack
data.article:
The Wolfpack Blueprint is a blueprint used at an Explosives Station to craft the Wolfpack grenade.

Once deployed, this grenade scatters into 12 individual homing missiles that quickly seek out and explode on impact with nearby ARCs. It is particularly effective for dealing significant damage to larger ARCs like the Rocketeer, Bastion, Bombardier, and Leaper.

data.name: Yellow Light Stick Blueprint
data.description: Lets you craft a Yellow Light Stick
data.article: The Yellow Light Stick Blueprint is a blueprint used at a crafting station to craft yellow light sticks.
